form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr7) over 1730m at this track beaten 21 m by Scar Struck (2:06.50) in 2yo 2 WINs on April 1 at $41. Two runs back was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track, beaten 9 m by Our Sweetheart (2:11.10) in 2yo No NR F on March 25 at $9.50. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten.

form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 5.5 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Revvin Reynard at this track over 1730m in a 2yo No NR CG on March 20 at $2. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second behind Don Hunter at this track over 1730m in a 2yo No NR CG on March 28 at $8.50. This race appears well within his grasp.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third after being driven well back, behind Captain Kostecki at this track over 1730m in a 2yo No NR CG on March 27 at $6.50. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third despite hanging in on scoring up, behind Scar Struck at this track over 1730m in a 2yo 2 WINs on April 1 at $34. Nicely placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Was on debut a big 7 m win as favourite (Fr6) at Newcastle (1:55.80) beating Pretty Privilege in 2yo MAIDEN on April 6 at $1.50 at the bell was leading 2.08. Great chance to win again.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into ninth after being driven well back, behind Jacwill Kid at this track over 1730m in a 2yo G1 No NR CG on March 28 at $26. One of the key runners.
